overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), starting on a street near the Night City Police Department, passing officers and vending machines, and ending in a dense urban plaza with towering buildings and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street approaching police department

events.description: camera turns right from main street toward the Night City Police Department building
futuristic black sedan drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk, turning toward the Night City Police Department entrance

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past the camera on the street

elevated multi-level highway structure with vehicles passing above
tall palm tree in circular concrete planter on sidewalk
large digital advertisement screen displaying animated content
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street with the camera turning toward the imposing Night City Police Department building. A futuristic sedan passes by on the left as the camera approaches the orange and white angular structure, with palm trees and holographic billboards visible along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: police department entrance plaza with officers

events.description: moving from asphalt street onto concrete sidewalk plaza in front of police department
approaching two NCPD police officers standing guard by their patrol vehicle

agents.ego_description: approaching two police officers standing guard by their NCPD patrol car

notable_agents.action: NCPD police officer standing with arms crossed near the patrol car door
second police officer in tactical gear standing by the rear of the vehicle

entered.detail: circular concrete planter containing a palm tree near the sidewalk edge
white concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto the concrete plaza in front of the police department, approaching two officers standing by their NCPD patrol car. A graffiti-covered wall becomes visible to the right as the camera passes the planters and approaches the vending machine area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with vending machines and graffiti wall

events.description: discovering unconscious person lying on ground next to vending machine with scattered newspapers
camera looks down at the person lying on the sidewalk next to the brown vending machine

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk, approaching vending machines and observing a person lying on the ground

notable_agents.action: unconscious or injured person lying on sidewalk next to vending machine surrounded by scattered newspapers
two people sitting on planter edge conversing near the wall

entered.detail: bright purple vending machine with hazard warning symbols and digital display
vintage-style brown vending machine with glass front and multiple selection buttons
newspapers littered across the concrete sidewalk ground

segments.scene_description: Moving along the narrow sidewalk beneath the building overhang, the camera approaches two vending machines against a graffiti-covered wall. An unconscious person lies on the ground next to the brown vending machine surrounded by scattered newspapers, while two pedestrians sit conversing nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with broken-down vehicle and maintenance workers

events.description: moving from sidewalk back onto street, approaching broken-down car with open hood
approaching mechanic and civilian inspecting the engine of the disabled vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking past the vending machine area and approaching a broken-down car with people gathered around it

notable_agents.action: mechanic in yellow safety vest and hard hat standing near a dump truck
civilian in white shirt inspecting the broken-down car with open hood

entered.detail: white futuristic sedan with hood open revealing engine components
large industrial dump truck with yellow cab and blue bed parked on street
steam rising from ground vent in the street

segments.scene_description: The camera moves back onto the asphalt street, passing a broken-down white futuristic car with its hood open. A mechanic in a safety vest stands nearby while a civilian inspects the engine, with steam rising from a street vent in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza with crosswalk and dense futuristic architecture

events.description: crossing wide pedestrian crosswalk with yellow stripes and WAIT X markings
entering large open plaza with multi-level buildings, holographic advertisements, and elevated skybridges

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street and entering a bustling plaza with many pedestrians and dense urban architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car driving through the plaza intersection

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red WAIT X markings
tall cylindrical structure displaying rotating holographic advertisements
open-air parking garage with multiple levels and teal structural support beams
elevated enclosed walkway connecting buildings with glass and metal structure

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide yellow-striped crosswalk into a vast urban plaza surrounded by towering futuristic buildings. A holographic advertising pillar dominates the center while elevated skybridges connect the structures, and pedestrians fill the open space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a structured police precinct area into the sprawling, chaotic heart of a futuristic urban plaza. It begins on a city street, turning toward the angular orange and white architecture of the Night City Police Department as a futuristic sedan glides past palm trees and holographic billboards. The camera then moves onto the concrete plaza, passing patrol officers and graffiti-covered walls before shifting beneath a building overhang where vending machines stand beside an unconscious person and chatting pedestrians. As the camera returns to the asphalt, it passes a broken-down white car with a mechanic and rising steam from a street vent, before finally crossing a wide yellow-striped crosswalk. The scene opens into a vast plaza dominated by a towering holographic advertising pillar, elevated skybridges, and a dense crowd of pedestrians beneath soaring skyscrapers.
